subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the Gracious. God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Conquering, the All-Powerful. His [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله لا اله الا هو العزیز الکریم شهد الله لا اله الا هو الغالب القدیر له
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
